## Meeting Purpose

[Discuss GrowthX's progress, gather feedback, and explore opportunities for improvement in content creation and SEO services for Smith.ai.](https://fathom.video/share/ovhRsQ1sHBU5cvAssMcym4di-FSX1R3-?tab=summary&timestamp=6.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [GrowthX has grown rapidly, now with \~50 customers and \~50 employees](https://fathom.video/share/ovhRsQ1sHBU5cvAssMcym4di-FSX1R3-?tab=summary&timestamp=167.0)
  - [Smith.ai sees value in backlinks and graphic design support](https://fathom.video/share/ovhRsQ1sHBU5cvAssMcym4di-FSX1R3-?tab=summary&timestamp=1075.0)
  - [Content quality needs improvement: more images, better structure, and unique tone](https://fathom.video/share/ovhRsQ1sHBU5cvAssMcym4di-FSX1R3-?tab=summary&timestamp=491.0)
  - [Reporting and strategy discussions should be more comprehensive and data-driven](https://fathom.video/share/ovhRsQ1sHBU5cvAssMcym4di-FSX1R3-?tab=summary&timestamp=600.0)

## Topics

### GrowthX Team Structure and Growth

  - [Matthew Panzarino joined as Chief Content Officer](https://fathom.video/share/ovhRsQ1sHBU5cvAssMcym4di-FSX1R3-?tab=summary&timestamp=246.0)
  - [Implemented Managing Directors with industry expertise (e.g., Dave from TripAdvisor, Jacob from G2.com)](https://fathom.video/share/ovhRsQ1sHBU5cvAssMcym4di-FSX1R3-?tab=summary&timestamp=306.0)
  - [Managing Editors guide editorial quality and manage Content Managers](https://fathom.video/share/ovhRsQ1sHBU5cvAssMcym4di-FSX1R3-?tab=summary&timestamp=340.0)
  - [Company split into "delivery" and "build" organizations](https://fathom.video/share/ovhRsQ1sHBU5cvAssMcym4di-FSX1R3-?tab=summary&timestamp=410.0)
  - [Rapid growth: \~50 customers, \~50 employees (tripled since initial conversation)](https://fathom.video/share/ovhRsQ1sHBU5cvAssMcym4di-FSX1R3-?tab=summary&timestamp=167.0)

### Content Quality and Improvement Areas

  - [Need for more images in blog posts (currently "thin")](https://fathom.video/share/ovhRsQ1sHBU5cvAssMcym4di-FSX1R3-?tab=summary&timestamp=549.0)
  - [Importance of unique, high-quality graphics (not repurposed)](https://fathom.video/share/ovhRsQ1sHBU5cvAssMcym4di-FSX1R3-?tab=summary&timestamp=491.0)
  - [Request for friendlier, clever, occasionally sarcastic tone](https://fathom.video/share/ovhRsQ1sHBU5cvAssMcym4di-FSX1R3-?tab=summary&timestamp=761.0)
  - [Emphasis on high-utility articles with clear criteria and structure](https://fathom.video/share/ovhRsQ1sHBU5cvAssMcym4di-FSX1R3-?tab=summary&timestamp=1329.0)
  - [Focus on content suitable for both AI search and traditional SEO](https://fathom.video/share/ovhRsQ1sHBU5cvAssMcym4di-FSX1R3-?tab=summary&timestamp=1372.0)

### Reporting and Strategy

  - [Weekly meetings should start with a 10-minute report on results and traffic](https://fathom.video/share/ovhRsQ1sHBU5cvAssMcym4di-FSX1R3-?tab=summary&timestamp=600.0)
  - [Need for consistent tracking of top keywords and overall SEO performance](https://fathom.video/share/ovhRsQ1sHBU5cvAssMcym4di-FSX1R3-?tab=summary&timestamp=632.0)
  - [Desire for broader view beyond just new content performance](https://fathom.video/share/ovhRsQ1sHBU5cvAssMcym4di-FSX1R3-?tab=summary&timestamp=649.0)

### Airtable Pitch Management

  - [Issues with duplicate pitches and outdated information](https://fathom.video/share/ovhRsQ1sHBU5cvAssMcym4di-FSX1R3-?tab=summary&timestamp=681.0)
  - [Need for pre-filtering before client review](https://fathom.video/share/ovhRsQ1sHBU5cvAssMcym4di-FSX1R3-?tab=summary&timestamp=711.0)
  - [Difficulty tracking approved vs. pending content](https://fathom.video/share/ovhRsQ1sHBU5cvAssMcym4di-FSX1R3-?tab=summary&timestamp=742.0)

### Backlinks and Programmatic Advertising

  - [Shift focus to backlinks instead of programmatic advertising](https://fathom.video/share/ovhRsQ1sHBU5cvAssMcym4di-FSX1R3-?tab=summary&timestamp=1075.0)
  - [Team receptive to feedback on reallocating budget](https://fathom.video/share/ovhRsQ1sHBU5cvAssMcym4di-FSX1R3-?tab=summary&timestamp=1038.0)

### Graphic Design Support

  - [GrowthX hiring more graphic designers](https://fathom.video/share/ovhRsQ1sHBU5cvAssMcym4di-FSX1R3-?tab=summary&timestamp=491.0)
  - [Smith.ai sees high value in professional design support](https://fathom.video/share/ovhRsQ1sHBU5cvAssMcym4di-FSX1R3-?tab=summary&timestamp=517.0)

### AI Search Optimization

  - [Growing importance of AI search (22 new clients in Q1 2024)](https://fathom.video/share/ovhRsQ1sHBU5cvAssMcym4di-FSX1R3-?tab=summary&timestamp=1311.0)
  - [Need to optimize content for both traditional SEO and AI search](https://fathom.video/share/ovhRsQ1sHBU5cvAssMcym4di-FSX1R3-?tab=summary&timestamp=1372.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Schedule a "reset session" to recalibrate strategy and tone](https://fathom.video/share/ovhRsQ1sHBU5cvAssMcym4di-FSX1R3-?tab=summary&timestamp=1140.0)
  - [Implement freelance designer support for Smith.ai account](https://fathom.video/share/ovhRsQ1sHBU5cvAssMcym4di-FSX1R3-?tab=summary&timestamp=1155.0)
  - [Matthew to conduct comprehensive content audit for all clients](https://fathom.video/share/ovhRsQ1sHBU5cvAssMcym4di-FSX1R3-?tab=summary&timestamp=1271.0)
  - [Develop more detailed polishing instructions for content creation](https://fathom.video/share/ovhRsQ1sHBU5cvAssMcym4di-FSX1R3-?tab=summary&timestamp=1435.0)
  - [Explore potential customer advisory mechanism](https://fathom.video/share/ovhRsQ1sHBU5cvAssMcym4di-FSX1R3-?tab=summary&timestamp=1620.0)
  - [Smith.ai to share ideas for potential tool development with GrowthX engineering team](https://fathom.video/share/ovhRsQ1sHBU5cvAssMcym4di-FSX1R3-?tab=summary&timestamp=1655.0)
